name: China Overseas Nuoxin International Holdings Limited
summary: China Overseas Nuoxin International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, designs, manufactures, and sells electrical haircare and healthcare products, and other small household electrical appliances. It also provides contract processing services. The company sells its products through brand owners and importers to beauty supply retailers and wholesalers, chain stores, mass merchandisers, warehouse clubs, and grocery stores, as well as through catalogues. China Overseas Nuoxin International Holdings Limited offers its products in Asia, Europe, North and South America, Africa, and Australia. The company was formerly known as Kenford Group Holdings Limited and changed its name to China Overseas Nuoxin International Holdings Limited in May 2019. China Overseas Nuoxin International Holdings Limited was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong. China Overseas Nuoxin International Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of China Yuen Capital Limited.
